'''Sakarie''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]<ref name="KOTORII" /> who met [[Meetra Surik]] in the [[Unidentified Iziz cantina|Iziz Cantina]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. She was seeking a [[starport visa]], which she needed to transport [[Permacrete/Legends|permacrete]] explosives for the powerful [[Exchange]] criminal organization. She was willing to offer a [[Rodian death blade|unique sword]], a rare [[Qixoni crystal/Legends|Qixoni crystal]], or five thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a visa.

==Behind the scenes==
She was voiced by [[Elizabeth Conboy]].

The player character is only able to learn that Sakarie is an Exchange member and needs the visa to transport explosives, if they have a high enough persuasion skill or by using [[Mind trick/Legends|Mind trick]]. Otherwise, the player will only hear vague rumors of Sakarie's inclination from other [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] patrons and Sakarie herself will not reveal any information.
